app.slogan: 日々研磨爆裂中！(Polishing & Exploding Daily!)
app.creator: Artist

app.fav_notice_2: If you clear browser data or change devices, your favorites will be lost.
app.no_mv_found: No MV found matching the criteria
app.about_p1: Hello! I'm Fantuan ("飯糰" in Chinese, it means 'rice ball' or 'onigiri'), welcome to this database.
app.about_p2: Actually, I've had the idea to make this database for a long time. As a club member, I often saw cosplayers looking for character design sheets, or illustrators looking for reference materials during events. Especially after Intense II was announced, the demand for fan art and freebies increased, and it was really inconvenient to search for design sheets everywhere, not to mention many had to overcome network environment difficulties. Plus, official materials are vast and scattered, making it exhausting to find them. I thought, if I could make a database myself, wouldn't it be much easier to use than QQ group albums? And so, this database was born.
app.about_p3: From organizing tweets at the very beginning, to launching a simple HTML framework built from scratch, I've continuously received high praise from everyone, which makes me genuinely happy. After all, the original intention was just to help more people.
app.about_p4: Later, I realized that a pure static webpage couldn't keep up with the demands, so with the 'physical cheats' of various AI, I started React engineering. Although 'vibe coding' is popular now, I do have some coding background and a slight obsession with UI/UX. So I acted as my own PM, polishing the details like crazy while ensuring a basic browsing experience. Since I'm not a professional web designer, I struggled a lot with choosing the style, finally settling on Neobrutalism, which matches ZUTOMAYO's visual style perfectly. From the overall layout to the Lightbox details, down to the pixel offset of every button, I tweaked the layout numerous times just to adapt it for both desktop and mobile screens.
app.about_p5: It might sound a bit wordy, but I have to share some of the clever ideas here. For example, to solve the biggest pain point in finding images, I put a lot of effort into the search function. Besides filtering by album and illustrator, to ensure search hit rates, I manually maintained almost all keyword aliases related to the songs, so you can get exact matches no matter what you search. There are also details hard to spot with the naked eye, like full support for 'Pan-CJK specific glyphs'. I researched this extensively and almost gave up on this feature while choosing fonts, until I found the amazing open-source project 'Fusion Pixel Font'. I also implemented different access handling for users in mainland China, overseas, and those bypassing firewalls. I even added PWA support so you can install it on your phone like an app, with some offline browsing capabilities. I'm also working on aligning original tweets with translations (still under construction).
app.about_p6: Besides perfecting the current MV gallery, I plan to create feature pages for illustrators, and eventually showcase excellent fan art retweeted by the official account. The sheer volume is overwhelming, so I'm researching if AI can help. It's a shame that so many god-tier fan arts get buried. (There I go, making promises again)
app.about_p7: Thanks for reading all this rambling! If you find anything annoying to use, or have ideas/suggestions for the database, I really hope you can take some time to give me feedback. Let's brainstorm and make this database better to help more people.
app.thanks_desc: Thanks to the following creators and open-source projects for their support and contributions:
app.thanks_wake_03: For huge contributions to the ZUTOMAYO fan community, and providing the license for the pixel Nira-chan mouse cursor and derivative emotes
app.thanks_fusion_pixel: For providing complete open-source font support for 'Pan-CJK specific glyphs'
app.thanks_fancybox: For an impeccable image Lightbox solution (though overriding the official styles was exhausting)
app.thanks_react: For helping transition the project from a static webpage to React engineering
app.thanks_cursor: The physical cheat that helped Onigiri polish these crazy UI details (I think it was using the GPT-5.4 model)
app.signal_intercepted: Signal intercepted by a mysterious force! Check another channel?
app.turn_off_desc: Turn off the lights, return to 'Forever Midnight'
app.turn_on_desc: Are you sure? 'Forever Midnight' is the best experience
app.disclaimer_1: This site is an unofficial database created by fans of 「Zutto Mayonaka de Iinoni.」 (ZUTOMAYO), solely for the purpose of community interaction and content curation, with no commercial intent.
app.disclaimer_2: The servers of this site do not store any original files. The copyright of all included videos, images, design sheets, illustrations, and related visual materials belongs to the original creators and their affiliated organizations.
app.disclaimer_3: If copyright holders have any concerns or takedown requests, please contact us.
app.fan_made: Fan-made project. Copyright of all media resources belongs to ZUTOMAYO.

geo.detecting_desc: Detecting the best connection node and resource loading strategy for you...
geo.warp_desc: 🛸 Spatial warp signal detected! Since you have the ability to bypass network barriers, image resources will be loaded directly from the official X/YouTube CDN to save proxy server bandwidth!
geo.cn_desc: Detected that you are located in Mainland China. Image resources will be accelerated via proxy servers to provide a stable and smooth viewing experience.
geo.global_desc: Detected that you are located outside Mainland China. Image resources will be loaded directly from official servers (X/YouTube) for physical limit speeds!
